info.title: Piwi Dashboard API
info.description: REST API for storing and querying Playwright test results, traces, failure diagnoses, and project statistics.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication (Bearer token with pd_ prefix). Obtain an API key via POST /api/users/:id/api-keys.

sessionCookie.name: nuxt_session
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie authentication. Set via POST /api/auth/login.
